debug_info.goal:
f : ℝ → ℂ
hf : IsUnifAlmostPeriodic f
⊢ ∃ C, ∀ (x : ℝ), ‖f x‖ ≤ C

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨l, hl⟩ := hf zero_lt_one
  obtain ⟨C, hC⟩ := (isCompact_Icc : IsCompact (Set.Icc 0 l)).exists_forall_le
    hf.uniformContinuous.continuous.continuousOn (Set.nonempty_Icc.mpr hl.pos.le)
  refine ⟨C + 1, fun x ↦ ?_⟩
  obtain ⟨y, hy, hτ⟩ := hl (-x)
  calc
    ‖f x‖ = ‖f y - (f y - f x)‖ := by rw [sub_sub_cancel]
    _ ≤ ‖f y‖ + ‖f y - f x‖ := norm_sub_le _ _
    _ = ‖f y‖ + ‖f (x + (-x + y)) - f x‖ := by ring_nf
    _ ≤ C + 1 := by
      gcongr
      · exact hC y (Set.Ico_subset_Icc_self hy)
      · exact hτ x
